text: hakim:4686 - Hayyan al-Asadi > ‘Al [Machine] To the Messenger of Allah £ 1 say: "Indeed, the Ummah will betray you after me, while you live according to my path and are killed upon my Sunnah. Whoever loves you, loves me, and whoever hates you, hates me. Indeed, this (beard) will be dyed with (henna) from this (head)." This is from the book "Sahih." ® - Sound (Dhahabi)
